name: Tyropitta Roumeliotiki (Cheese Pie)
recipeIngredient: ½ cup Butter, melted for brushing
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the feta cheese and mix with the beaten eggs.
2. Butter a baking pan large enough to hold the phyllo pastry. Lay four sheets of phyllo in the pan, brushing each with melted butter. Spoon some of the cheese mixture onto the phyllo, then top with two more sheets, brushing them with butter. Repeat this process until all the cheese mixture is used, setting aside 4 sheets of phyllo for the top.
3. Score the pastry lightly into long strips.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 300°F for about 45 minutes.
5. Cut the scored strips into 2-inch pieces and serve hot. Serves 6-8.
